project.name: roadtripper
project.description: Road trip planner using Urban Explorer database with persona-based recommendations

current_phase.last_session_work: Session 4 + 4.5: Stop recommendation engine (geometric + Routes API v2 matrix) + council retro review + Tier 1 remediation (input validation, rate limit, computeRouteMatrix migration, samplePolyline interpolation fix, projectOntoPolyline precision fix, scaled detour cap, LRU cache). NYC→Miami now correctly surfaces DC.
current_phase.next_action: Session 5: Persona system — persona definitions, persona-to-vibe mapping, ranked waypoint scoring (Tier 2 council fixes pair naturally here)

foundation: Next.js 16 project init with TypeScript + Tailwind
Firebase/Firestore connection to urbanexplorer named database
Google Maps API setup with route display
core: Route calculation via Google Maps Directions API
Stop recommendation engine (query waypoints within +/- 60 min of route)
Dynamic route recalculation on stop selection
personas: Persona selector UI (outdoorsman, foodie, gearhead, culture, nerd)
Persona-to-vibe mapping (Urban Explorer vibeClass + waypoint categories)
Filtered recommendations based on active persona
Persona-themed route line colors and markers
polish: Multi-day itinerary view with day dividers

completed_features: Google Maps RouteMap with Directions renderer
/plan page with Routes API v2 server action
Stop recommendation engine (geometric + Routes API computeRouteMatrix)
Tier 1 council remediation (input validation, rate limit, samplePolyline interpolation, projectOntoPolyline precision, scaled detour cap, LRU cache)
resume_instructions: Sessions 4 + 4.5 complete. Stop recommendation engine working end-to-end: NYC→Miami at budget=4 surfaces NYC, DC, Miami. Tier 1 council fixes shipped (input validation, rate limit, computeRouteMatrix migration killed 25x quota waste, samplePolyline interpolation, projectOntoPolyline precision fix, scaled detour cap, LRU cache). Council is now a hard pre-EXECUTE gate per skills/10-build.md. Next: Session 5 — Persona system. Tier 2 council fixes (clickable candidates, labeled markers, RankedWaypoint type, hover sync) pair naturally with persona scoring.
